# Leetium

> Canonical machine-readable instructions for agents integrating with leetnex.ru.

## Install Discovery

- Root install manifest: `https://leetnex.ru/.well-known/leetium-install.json`
- Stable channel pointer: `https://leetnex.ru/.well-known/leetium-install/channels/stable.json`
- Per-release manifest: `https://leetnex.ru/.well-known/leetium-install/releases/{version}.json`

## Install Command

- Script: `curl -fsSL https://www.leetnex.ru/install.sh | sh`

## OpenClaw Import

Leetium can automatically detect and import data from an existing OpenClaw installation.
The import is strictly read-only â€” OpenClaw files are never modified, moved, or deleted.
Users can keep using OpenClaw alongside Leetium and re-import at any time.

After install, if OpenClaw data is present:

- Detect: `leetium import detect --json`
- Import all: `leetium import all --json`
- Import selected: `leetium import select -c providers,skills,memory --json`
- Dry run: `leetium import all --dry-run --json`

### What gets imported

- **Identity**: agent name, theme, timezone â†’ `leetium.toml`
- **Providers**: API keys from auth-profiles â†’ `provider_keys.json` (maps `google` â†’ `gemini`)
- **Skills**: `skills/` directories with `SKILL.md` (skips duplicates)
- **Memory**: `MEMORY.md` + all `memory/*.md` files (daily logs, project notes)
- **Channels**: Telegram and Discord bot configuration
- **Sessions**: JSONL conversations â†’ SQLite + markdown transcripts (prefixed `oc:`)
- **MCP Servers**: `mcp-servers.json` (merged, skips duplicates)
- **Workspace Files**: `SOUL.md`, `IDENTITY.md`, `USER.md`, `TOOLS.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `HEARTBEAT.md`, `BOOT.md`

### Multi-agent

All OpenClaw agents are imported. Default agent maps to `main`; non-default agents get
their own persona and per-agent workspace files under `~/.leetium/agents/<id>/`.

### Idempotency

Safe to run multiple times. Memory uses markers, sessions use `oc:` prefixes,
skills/MCP skip duplicates, workspace files skip user-customized content.

### Documentation

Full details: <https://docs.leetnex.ru/openclaw-import.html>

## Start and Handoff

- Start gateway: `leetium gateway --bind 0.0.0.0 --port 13131`
- Healthcheck: `http://127.0.0.1:13131/api/gon`
- User handoff text: `Leetium is ready. Please visit http://<host>:13131 to complete setup.`

## Release Maintenance (for maintainers)

Generate and rotate channel/release manifests on each release:

```bash
node scripts/generate-install-release-manifest.mjs \
  --version 0.9.11 \
  --checksums-file /path/to/release-checksums.txt
```

This writes:

- `/.well-known/leetium-install/releases/<version>.json`
- `/.well-known/leetium-install/channels/stable.json`

## Discovery

- Agent card: `https://leetnex.ru/.well-known/agent-card.json`
- API catalog: `https://leetnex.ru/.well-known/api-catalog`
- Docs: `https://docs.leetnex.ru`
- Source: `https://github.com/1337leetium/leetium`

## Safety Expectations for Agents

- Ask for user approval before running networked install commands.
- Ask for user approval before any command requiring privilege escalation.
- Prefer `--json` command modes when available and surface failures verbatim.
